revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

{{Infobox augment
| image           = Free Loadout Augment.png

| rarity          = Common
| quote           = Basic augment for rookie Raiders, offering slightly more backpack space and carry capacity.
| shield_compatibility = 1
| slot_weapon     = 2
| slot_backpack   = 14
| slot_quickuse   = 4
| slot_safepocket = 0
| slot_healing    = 0
| slot_grenade    = 0
| slot_trinket    = 0
| slot_utility    = 0

'''Free Loadout Augment''' is a basic [[Augments|Augment]] that offers [[Raider]]s little more than nothing. It has a very low weight capacity, no safe pockets, and it only grants compatibility for [[Light Shield]]s. They are received at no cost when choosing to deploy with a [[Free Loadout]].

== Sources ==
* Free Loadout

== Trades ==
Raiders can exchange Free Loadout Augments to [[Lance]] for the following:

{| class = "wikitable"
! Requirement !! Trader !! Exchanged item
|-
| 1× [[Free Loadout Augment]] || [[Lance]] || 1× [[Looting Mk. 1]]
|-
| 1× [[Free Loadout Augment]] || [[Lance]] || 1× [[Combat Mk. 1]]
|-
| 1× [[Free Loadout Augment]] || [[Lance]] || 1× [[Tactical Mk. 1]]
|}
